mapper.select: SELECT scf.id ,scf.name ,scf.pc_id ,scf.source_name ,scf.source_path ,scf.target_name ,scf.target_path ,DATE_FORMAT(scf.last_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS last_dt ,scf.used ,scf.run ,scf.parsing_type_id ,dc.name AS pc_text ,ac.text AS parsing_text FROM system_collect_file scf JOIN dain_computer dc ON dc.id = scf.pc_id JOIN admin_code ac ON ac.id = scf.parsing_type_id WHERE scf.used = true ORDER BY scf.id DESC
SELECT id AS idx, type, value, text, info, used FROM admin_code WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE system_collect_file SET used = false WHERE id = #{params.id}
mapper.select: SELECT dp.id ,dp.company_id ,dp.code ,dp.short_name ,dp.full_name ,dp.manager ,dp.url ,dp.run ,dp.open ,IFNULL(au.user, '') AS user ,IFNULL(au.password, '') AS password ,IFNULL(au.id, '') AS user_id FROM dain_place dp LEFT JOIN admin_user au ON au.place_id = dp.id WHERE dp.used = true AND dp.old_version = false ORDER BY dp.short_name ASC
SELECT id ,name ,ip ,description FROM dain_computer WHERE used = true ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id ,full_name ,short_name ,tel ,address FROM dain_company WHERE used = true ORDER BY full_name ASC
SELECT id ,code FROM dain_logger WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND used = true ORDER BY code ASC
SELECT id ,logger_id ,code ,sensor_type_id FROM dain_sensor WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND used = true ORDER BY logger_id ASC, sensor_order ASC, code ASC
SELECT id ,code FROM dain_logger WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND used = true
SELECT id, created FROM dain_place WHERE code = #{code}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dain_place WHERE code = #{params.code}
mapper.update: UPDATE dain_place SET used = false WHERE id = #{params.id}
UPDATE admin_user SET used = false WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE dain_company SET used = false WHERE id = #{params.id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dain_company WHERE full_name = #{params.full_name}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dain_computer WHERE name = #{params.name}
mapper.update: UPDATE dain_computer SET used = false WHERE id = #{params.id}
UPDATE dain_logger SET used = false WHERE id = #{params.id}
UPDATE dain_sensor SET used = false WHERE id = #{params.id}
mapper.select: SELECT id ,code ,name FROM dain_sensor_type WHERE used = true ORDER BY code ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE dain_sensor_type SET used = false WHERE id = #{params.id}
mapper.select: SELECT dsts.id ,dst.code FROM dain_sensor_type dst JOIN dain_sensor_type_setting dsts ON dsts.sensor_type_id = dst.id AND dsts.place_id = #{placeId}
SELECT id ,name ,target_column ,formula ,IFNULL(description, '') AS description FROM dain_calculation_item WHERE used = true ORDER BY name ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dain_calculation_item WHERE name = #{params.name}
mapper.update: UPDATE dain_calculation_item SET used = false WHERE id = #{params.id}
mapper.select: SELECT dsac.id ,dci.target_column ,dci.formula ,IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN dcp.param_key = 'A' THEN CAST(dcp.param_value AS CHAR) END), '0') AS A ,IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN dcp.param_key = 'B' THEN CAST(dcp.param_value AS CHAR) END), '0') AS B ,IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN dcp.param_key = 'C' THEN CAST(dcp.param_value AS CHAR) END), '0') AS C ,IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN dcp.param_key = 'D' THEN CAST(dcp.param_value AS CHAR) END), '0') AS D ,IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN dcp.param_key = 'E' THEN CAST(dcp.param_value AS CHAR) END), '0') AS E ,DATE_FORMAT(dsac.from_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS from_dt ,IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(dsac.to_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '무기한') AS to_dt FROM dain_sensor_apply_calculation dsac JOIN dain_calculation_item dci ON dci.id = dsac.calculation_item_id LEFT JOIN dain_calculation_param dcp ON dcp.apply_calculation_id = dsac.id WHERE dsac.sensor_id = #{sensorId} AND dsac.used = true GROUP BY dci.target_column, dci.formula, dsac.id, dsac.from_dt ORDER BY dci.target_column, dsac.from_dt DESC, dsac.id DESC

SELECT ROUND(raw_val, 3) AS raw_val ,ROUND(displace_val, 3) AS displace_val ,DATE_FORMAT(from_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS from_dt ,IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(to_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '무기한') AS to_dt FROM dain_sensor_initial WHERE sensor_id = #{sensorId} ORDER BY from_dt DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS data_${code} ( id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, logger_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '로거ID', sensor_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '센서ID', measured_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '측정일시', raw_val DECIMAL(10,5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '원시값', correction_val DECIMAL(10,5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '보정값', angle_val DECIMAL(10,5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '각도값', displace_val DECIMAL(10,5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '변위값', initial_val DECIMAL(10,5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '초기치', changed_val DECIMAL(10,5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '변화량', is_hourly TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '정각여부', added TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '추가여부', used TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '사용여부', FOREIGN KEY (logger_id) REFERENCES dain_logger(id), FOREIGN KEY (sensor_id) REFERENCES dain_sensor(id), UNIQUE (sensor_id, measured_at), INDEX idx_measured_at (measured_at), INDEX idx_logger_time (logger_id, measured_at), INDEX idx_is_hourly_measured_at (is_hourly, measured_at) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
UPDATE dain_place SET created = true WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(group_order) + 1, 0) AS next_group_order, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dain_sensor_type_setting WHERE place_id = #{params.place_id} AND sensor_type_id = #{params.sensor_type_id} ) AS find_setting FROM dain_sensor_type_setting WHERE place_id = #{params.place_id};
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dain_logger WHERE code = #{params.code}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dain_sensor_type WHERE code = #{params.code}

SELECT DISTINCT dp.id ,dp.short_name FROM dain_place dp INNER JOIN dain_logger dl ON dl.place_id = dp.id AND dl.cycle_check = false WHERE dp.used = true AND dp.old_version = false ORDER BY dp.short_name ASC
SELECT id ,code FROM dain_logger WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND used = true AND cycle_check = false ORDER BY code ASC

SELECT ds.id ,ds.code ,ds.logger_id FROM dain_sensor ds INNER JOIN dain_logger dl ON dl.id = ds.logger_id AND dl.cycle_check = false WHERE ds.place_id = #{placeId} AND ds.used = true ORDER BY code ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE system_data_delete SET used = false WHERE id = #{params.id}
mapper.select: SELECT sdd.id ,dp.short_name AS place_name ,dl.code AS logger_code ,ds.code AS sensor_code ,ds.name AS sensor_name ,sdd.del_point ,sdd.target_column ,DATE_FORMAT(sdd.start_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS start_dt ,DATE_FORMAT(sdd.last_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS last_dt ,sdd.run FROM system_data_delete sdd LEFT JOIN dain_sensor ds ON ds.id = sdd.sensor_id LEFT JOIN dain_logger dl ON dl.id = ds.logger_id LEFT JOIN dain_place dp ON dp.id = ds.place_id WHERE sdd.used = true ORDER BY id
SELECT id ,place_id ,code ,name ,location ,cdma_no ,computer_id ,install_dt ,file_path ,cycle_check ,run FROM dain_logger WHERE id = #{params.id}
SELECT id ,code ,name ,location ,sensor_type_id ,sensor_order ,DATE_FORMAT(install_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS install_dt FROM dain_sensor WHERE id = #{params.id}

SELECT dsts.id ,dst.name ,dsts.group_order ,dsts.min_gauge ,dsts.max_gauge ,dsts.criteria_val1 ,dsts.criteria_val2 ,dsts.criteria_val3 ,dsts.interval ,dsts.hidden FROM dain_sensor_type_setting dsts JOIN dain_sensor_type dst ON dst.id = dsts.sensor_type_id WHERE dsts.id = #{params.id}

SELECT sdd.id ,sdd.sensor_id ,ds.code AS sensor_code ,ds.name AS sensor_name ,dl.id AS logger_id ,dl.code AS logger_code ,dp.id AS place_id ,dp.short_name AS place_name ,sdd.del_point ,sdd.target_column ,DATE_FORMAT(sdd.start_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS start_dt ,DATE_FORMAT(sdd.last_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS last_dt ,sdd.run FROM system_data_delete sdd LEFT JOIN dain_sensor ds ON ds.id = sdd.sensor_id LEFT JOIN dain_logger dl ON dl.id = ds.logger_id LEFT JOIN dain_place dp ON dp.id = ds.place_id WHERE sdd.id = #{params.id}
SELECT id ,name ,pc_id ,source_name ,source_path ,target_name ,target_path ,DATE_FORMAT(last_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS last_dt ,run ,parsing_type_id FROM system_collect_file WHERE id = #{params.id}
SELECT ds.sensor_type_id ,dst.code FROM dain_sensor ds JOIN dain_sensor_type dst ON dst.id = ds.sensor_type_id WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND ds.used = true GROUP BY sensor_type_id;

SELECT dd.id ,dp.code AS place_code ,dp.short_name AS place_name ,ds.code AS sensor_code ,ds.name AS sensor_name ,DATE_FORMAT(dd.measured_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS measured_at ,ROUND(dd.raw_val, 3) AS raw_val ,ROUND(dd.correction_val, 3) AS correction_val ,ROUND(dd.angle_val, 3) AS angle_val ,ROUND(dd.displace_val, 3) AS displace_val ,ROUND(dd.initial_val, 3) AS initial_val ,ROUND(dd.changed_val, 3) AS changed_val ,dd.used FROM data_${params.placeCode} dd JOIN dain_sensor ds ON ds.id = dd.sensor_id JOIN dain_logger dl ON dl.id = dd.logger_id JOIN dain_place dp ON dp.id = dl.place_id WHERE DATE(dd.measured_at) = #{params.search} AND dd.sensor_id = #{params.sensorId} AND dd.used = #{params.used} ORDER BY dd.measured_at DESC

SELECT dd.id ,dp.code AS place_code ,dp.short_name AS place_name ,dl.code AS logger_code ,ds.name AS sensor_name ,ds.code AS sensor_code ,DATE_FORMAT(dd.measured_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS measured_at ,ROUND(dd.raw_val, 3) AS raw_val ,ROUND(dd.correction_val, 3) AS correction_val ,ROUND(dd.angle_val, 3) AS angle_val ,ROUND(dd.displace_val, 3) AS displace_val ,ROUND(dd.initial_val, 3) AS initial_val ,ROUND(dd.changed_val, 3) AS changed_val FROM data_${params.place} dd JOIN dain_sensor ds ON ds.id = dd.sensor_id JOIN dain_logger dl ON dl.id = dd.logger_id JOIN dain_place dp ON dp.id = dl.place_id WHERE dd.id = #{params.id}

SELECT dl.id ,dp.short_name AS placeName ,dl.code AS loggerCode ,dc.name AS pcName ,dl.file_path AS filePath ,DATE_FORMAT(dl.uploaded_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS uploadedAt ,dl.run FROM dain_logger dl JOIN dain_place dp ON dp.id = dl.place_id JOIN dain_computer dc ON dc.id = dl.computer_id WHERE dl.used = true AND dp.old_version = false AND dp.used = true ORDER BY dp.short_name ASC, dl.code ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(sul.run_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS runTime ,dp.short_name AS placeName ,dl.code AS loggerCode ,sul.row_count AS rowCount ,sul.action ,sul.log_msg AS logMsg FROM system_upload_log sul JOIN dain_logger dl ON dl.id = sul.logger_id JOIN dain_place dp ON dp.id = dl.place_id WHERE DATE(sul.run_time) = CURDATE() ORDER BY sul.run_time DESC, dl.code ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE dain_logger SET run = #{params.run} WHERE id = #{params.loggerId}
UPDATE data_${params.place} SET used = true WHERE id = #{params.id}
